acceptTerms.title: Terms of Service
acceptTerms.subtitle: Please review and accept our terms of service to continue
acceptTerms.checkboxRequired: You must accept the terms to continue
acceptTerms.checkboxLabel: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. I understand that violating these terms may result in account termination.
acceptTerms.closerAccountNote: Your account was created by our sales team. Please accept the terms to access your dashboard and start creating campaigns.
acceptTerms.leftSubtitle: These terms keep our platform fair, safe, and Amazon-compliant for every author and reader.

leftPoints.title: Transparent Rules
leftPoints.desc: Clear and fair platform terms that protect everyone

leftPoints.title: Amazon Compliant
leftPoints.desc: Our review process follows Amazon's policies

leftPoints.title: Data Privacy
leftPoints.desc: Your information is encrypted and never sold

leftPoints.title: Account Protection
leftPoints.desc: We enforce terms to keep the platform trustworthy

acceptTerms.securityNote: Your acceptance is recorded securely on our servers.

termsContent.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
termsContent.body: By using BookProof, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.

termsContent.heading: 2. Service Description
termsContent.body: BookProof connects authors with readers to facilitate authentic book reviews on Amazon. Authors purchase credits to initiate review campaigns for their books.

termsContent.heading: 3. Author Responsibilities
termsContent.body: Authors must provide accurate book information, high-quality materials, and comply with all Amazon policies regarding reviews.

termsContent.heading: 4. Review Authenticity
termsContent.body: All reviews facilitated through BookProof must be genuine and reflect the reader's honest opinion. Fake reviews are strictly prohibited.

termsContent.heading: 5. Payment and Credits
termsContent.body: Credits purchased are non-refundable except as specified in our refund policy. Credits expire 12 months from the purchase date.

termsContent.heading: 6. Privacy
termsContent.body: Your personal information is protected according to our Privacy Policy. We do not share your data with third parties without consent.

termsContent.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
termsContent.body: BookProof is not responsible for review outcomes on Amazon or any consequences of using our service.

termsContent.heading: 8. Termination
termsContent.body: We reserve the right to terminate accounts that violate these terms.
